title: Project Solaris Modpack
description: This is the official modpack of Project Solaris, a Cobblemon Server.
body:
![Project Solaris Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50f7e55993d293afa98af9a1c4a3deeced71faca_0.webp)
# ☀️ Official Server of Modpack!
This pack was built with the Project Solaris server in mind! It includes Cobblemon, tons of quality-of-life features, and performance enhancement mods.
It's highly optimized to run smoothly even on low-end hardware. We recommend allocating 4GB of RAM for the best experience.

The pack uses 1.7 Cobblemon on 1.21.1 Minecraft Fabric.

🌐 IP: play.projectsolaris.net
📩 Discord: https://discord.gg/xtR3wWSPyz
# 🎮 Server Features 🧍‍♂️
![2 Custom Megas from Project Solaris: Mega Magmortar & Mega Electivire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80a12cfe9e5607cee13fa68d19d7be356920f946_0.webp)
**Server Features**
- A complete Pokedex as of Pokemon Legends: Z-A, including Server-exclusive Fakemon!
- New and returning Mega Evolutions! (Including Mega Evolutions from Pokemon Legends: Z-A and it's DLC)
- An expansive Item & Block shop!
- Interactable NPCs!
- Kits & Skins Crates!
- PokeNav!
- Breeding!
- Pokebuilder!
- Global Trade System! (GTS)
- Wonder Trade!
<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

- Cobblemon
- Biomes o' Plenty
- Terralith
- Nature's Compass
- Cobblemon PokeNav
- Mega Showdown
- Better End & Better Nether
- Reinforced Chests
- Traveler's Backpack
- Xaero's Worldmap & Xaero's Minimap
- Farmer's Delight
- Another Furniture Mod

</details>

![The PokeNav screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f8822563cafe877c9b39d21313e14da8e182965_0.webp)
![One of the beautiful End biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a0e3fc8feac2ea278fa57389985e36ddf453c9_0.webp)
![Project Solaris' Spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b29bec7a6efc2672786e622f4c17a6b56984fd4_0.webp)
